name: Your Husband Is Cheating On Us
original_name: Your Husband Is Cheating On Us
overview: Shining a light on the world of  the urban theater and revealing the show behind the show, producer and director JD Lawrence mounts his new production of the stage play Your Husband Is Cheating On Us, implementing unorthodox creative methods with his cast.

trailers.title: Your Husband Is Cheating On Us: Season 1 First Look - Premiering April 1 at 9/8c | Bravo
